description:
## Component: hx-top-nav (NEW) **Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries** Top-of-page site navigation bar with logo, menu items, and utility area. ### ADR-001 Classification: Slot-Driven (Composite) Drupal controls all navigation content via slots. ### API Design **Properties:** `sticky` (boolean), `label` (nav landmark) **Slots:** `logo` (brand area), default (main nav items), `actions` (utility area — search, user menu) **CSS Parts:** `nav`, `logo`, `menu`, `actions`, `mobile-toggle` **Events:** `hx-mobile-toggle` (hamburger menu opened/closed) ### Drupal Integration ```twig {% for item in main_menu %} {{ item.title }} {% endfor %}
{{ drupal_block('user_menu') }}
``` ### Healthcare: Hospital portal headers, patient-facing site navigation ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Responsive: hamburger menu on mobile 2. Sticky mode for persistent navigation 3. Logo, nav items, and utility slots 4. WCAG 2.1 AA: nav landmark, skip navigation link support 5. Works with Drupal main menu system
title: T2-38: hx-top-nav — Top-of-Page Navigation

## Component: hx-top-nav (NEW) **Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries** Top-of-page site navigation bar with logo, menu items, and utility area. ### ADR-001 Classification: Slot-Driven (Composite) Drupal controls all navigation content via slots. ### API Design **Properties:** `sticky` (boolean), `label` (nav landmark) **Slots:** `logo` (brand area), default (main nav items), `actions` (utility area — search, user menu) **CSS Parts:** `nav`, `logo`, `menu`, `actions`, `mobile-toggle` **Events:** `hx-mobile-toggle` (hamburger menu opened/closed) ### Drupal Integration ```twig {% for item in main_menu %} {{ item.title }} {% endfor %}
{{ drupal_block('user_menu') }}
``` ### Healthcare: Hospital portal headers, patient-facing site navigation ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Responsive: hamburger menu on mobile 2. Sticky mode for persistent navigation 3. Logo, nav items, and utility slots 4. WCAG 2.1 AA: nav landmark, skip navigation link support 5. Works with Drupal main menu system

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 1**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-top-nav/hx-top-nav.styles.ts`:
- Around line 155-161: The `@media` (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule targets
.nav__collapsible but there is no transition defined for that selector, so
either remove the dead media-query block or add the intended transition to
.nav__collapsible; update the stylesheet by either deleting the `@media`
(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block around .nav__collapsible or by adding the
planned transition declaration (e.g., the same transition used for
collapsing/expanding the nav) to the .nav__collapsible selector so the
reduced-motion override has an effect.
```

</details>
